question.label: Priority clarity
question.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
question.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

answer: I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.

assessment.note: Lack of substantive feedback on key decisions signals weak alignment and muted ownership around current priorities; also hints at support friction.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that you need?

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?

new_queue.label: Hand-off friction
new_queue.name: What makes it hard to hand more of this off?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
